differentials.name: recurrent episodes of dull pain / acute pancreatitis ← impaired outflow of pancreatic secretions:
differentials.raw: recurrent episodes of dull pain / acute pancreatitis ← impaired outflow of pancreatic secretions:

differentials.name: viscosity of fluid greater than normal serum
differentials.raw: viscosity of fluid greater than normal serum (89% sensitive, 100% specific)

differentials.name: spillage of thick jellylike mucin from ampulla of Vater with protrusion from bulging patulous duodenal papilla
differentials.raw: spillage of thick jellylike mucin from ampulla of Vater with protrusion from bulging patulous duodenal papilla

differentials.name: Serous / mucinous cystic tumors
differentials.raw: Serous / mucinous cystic tumors (NO communication with pancreatic duct, lobulated contour)

differentials.name: usually incidental finding when tumor small
differentials.raw: usually incidental finding when tumor small

context: Location:   frequently multifocal; 5-10% involve entire pancreas ◊  Location is an important factor for prognosis! √  communication between cystic lesion + main pancreatic duct (= most reliable diagnostic finding!): √  narrow neck at cyst-duct junction √  mural nodules projecting into main pancreatic duct √  protrusion of major papilla ERCP: √  plugging of papilla of Vater √  elongated band- / threadlike / nodular amorphous filling defects in dilated pancreatic duct (= depiction of mucin) √  usually small mural polypoid / flat tumor √  dilated pancreatic ductal system in the absence of an obst
